channel.title: Posts on Essentialist
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Essentialist

item.title: Essentialist
item.description:
Programs for spaced repetition using flashcards in Markdown.

  • Essentialist: Application for desktops and mobiles
  • Flashdown: Console application

The space repetition algorithm used is based on SM-2.

Key features:

  • Privacy: No cloud, your data never leave your device.
  • Easy card creation: Flash cards are plain text Markdown files.
  • Cross-platform: Runs on Linux, MacOS, Windows and android.

See the CONTRIBUTING.md for how to report bugs and submit pull request.

Flash cards syntax

Each deck of cards is a plain text Markdown files with the extension .md (ex: sample.md). You can put all your decks in the same directory.
